text.title: CI Evaluation Gate Config Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ci-eval-gate-config. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Every PR fails on faithfulness=0.87 even though main is 0.86; team disables the gate.
antipattern.fix: Switch to regression-only gating with absolute floor for safety only.

antipattern.symptom: PR regresses PII-leak rate from 0% to 0.5%; within tolerance, merges.
antipattern.root-cause: Safety metric gated by delta, not absolute floor.
antipattern.fix: Safety metrics ALWAYS use absolute floor + zero tolerance.

antipattern.symptom: Eval runs in console; PR reviewer cannot see scores; trust erodes.
antipattern.fix: Mandate JSON + Markdown artifact in CI workflow.
